'''Virgillia 7''', or '''Virgillia VII''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Virgillia system/Legends|Virgillia system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
It was a tiny colony world that was considered "remote" by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It had been a hotbed of [[Virgillian Free Alignment/Legends|Virgillian Free Alignment]] resistance against the Imperial-aligned [[Aristocracy]]<ref name="Bakura sourcebook">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> since the beginning of the [[Virgillian Civil War]] in [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]].<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|jediwatch/13228_1.html|Virgillian Jedi Envoy Declared Lost}}</ref> During the Imperial era, the resistance forces were led by the parents of [[Tessa Manchisco]], until Imperial forces raided the Manchisco home and summarily executed them, leaving Tessa to flee and hide in the homes of other resistance members.<ref name="Bakura sourcebook" />

In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] diplomatic envoy was sent to conduct peace talks in the hope of ending the civil war, but their transport was attacked on arrival and all four Jedi were believed<ref name="Skyewalkers" /> killed.<ref name="HNN" /> Early in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was the site of a mission.<ref name="Skyewalkers">''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]''</ref>
